Class CompositeDetector

java.lang.Object
com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.CompositeDetector
All Implemented Interfaces:
PIIDetector
public final class CompositeDetector extends Object implements PIIDetector
Combines the outputs of multiple PIIDetector implementations and returns a de-duplicated, non-overlapping list of matches.

De-duplication strategy

  1. Sort all raw matches by start position; for the same start, prefer the longer span (greedy-longest match).
  2. Walk the sorted list, discarding any match that starts before the end of the last retained match (overlap removal).
  3. When a heuristic match and an ML match cover the same span, promote the source to PIIMatch.DetectionSource.HYBRID and keep the higher confidence score.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Hemant Naik

    Creates a composite detector that runs each supplied detector in order.

    • CompositeDetector

      public CompositeDetector(List<PIIDetector> detectors)
      Creates a composite detector that runs each supplied detector in order.
      Parameters:
      detectors - ordered list of detectors (must not be null)

  • Method Details

    • name

      public String name()
      Description copied from interface: PIIDetector
      Returns a short human-readable name used in logging and metrics (e.g. "HeuristicDetector", "NaiveBayesMLDetector").
      Specified by:
      name in interface PIIDetector

    • detect

      public List<PIIMatch> detect(String text)
      Description copied from interface: PIIDetector
      Scans the supplied text and returns every PII span detected.

      Matches may overlap; callers (typically CompositeDetector) are responsible for de-duplication.

      Specified by:
      detect in interface PIIDetector
      Parameters:
      text - the text to scan (never null)
      Returns:
      mutable list of detected spans; empty if none found
